mapper.select: SELECT ar.*, q.question_content, q.question_type, q.options, q.correct_answer FROM answer_record ar LEFT JOIN question q ON ar.question_id = q.question_id WHERE ar.record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY ar.answer_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO answer_record (record_id, question_id, student_answer, is_correct, score, answer_time) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{questionId}, #{studentAnswer}, #{isCorrect}, #{score}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE answer_record SET student_answer = #{studentAnswer}, is_correct = #{isCorrect}, score = #{score}, answer_time = NOW() WHERE answer_id = #{answerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO answer_record (record_id, question_id, student_answer, is_correct, score, answer_time) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{questionId}, #{studentAnswer}, #{isCorrect}, #{score}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE student_answer = #{studentAnswer}, is_correct = #{isCorrect}, score = #{score}, answer_time = NOW()
